_note: Static-only lab: no deploys. verify-devfile greps the static ~/exercises/devfile.yaml (runs anywhere). verify-checluster does `exit 0` in both branches, so it passes on CRC even though the CheCluster CRD / Dev Spaces operator is not installed — exercised as-is, not excluded. `oc get checluster -A` errors on CRC (no CRD); that mirrors the content and the check tolerates it. No excludes.
